title: Databricks Apps support for Lakebase resources
body:
Databricks Apps now supports adding Lakebase database instances as app resources. You can then include these resources as environment variables and access them from your app code.

See [Add a Lakebase resource to a Databricks app](/aws/en/dev-tools/databricks-apps/lakebase).

ref_links.text: Add a Lakebase resource to a Databricks app
